strategy_type: Cross-sectional momentum on leveraged ETFs + crypto

historical.name: 2015-16 Oil Crash
historical.description: Commodity collapse; SPY -13% peak-to-trough. BTC was rangebound; 3x equity ETFs churned.

historical.name: 2017 Crypto Bull
historical.description: BTC 15x, ETH 90x. Momentum sleeve rotated heavily into crypto names.

historical.name: 2018 Crypto Crash
historical.description: BTC -75% from peak. BTC-trend filter cut exposure early.

historical.name: 2020 COVID Crash
historical.description: SPY -34% in 5 weeks; SPY-regime gate forces equity rotation to cash.

historical.name: 2020 Recovery
historical.description: Post-crash, everything rallied — 3x tech and BTC both hit tops.

historical.name: 2022 Bear Market
historical.description: Rate-shock killed both stocks and BTC. Regime gates cut exposure.

hypothetical.name: SPY −30% drawdown (slow)
hypothetical.description: Regime gate (SPY<200dma or VIX>30) deleverages equity leg to cash.
hypothetical.basis: Equity weight ~51% on average; gate typically cuts within 2 weeks.

hypothetical.name: BTC −60% crash
hypothetical.description: BTC-trend gate (>200dma) trips; crypto leg rotates to cash.
hypothetical.basis: Avg crypto weight 15%; concentrated periods up to 66%. Trend filter caps downside.

hypothetical.name: VIX spike to 40 (fast selloff)
hypothetical.description: Weekly rebalance cadence can't react to a 1-day 5% equity shock.
hypothetical.basis: 3x ETFs compound losses intra-week; historical worst daily ~-7%.

hypothetical.name: Tech rally (NDX +20% in month)
hypothetical.description: Momentum sleeve captures via TQQQ/SOXL/TECL; typical beta to NDX ~1.5-2x.
hypothetical.basis: Top-3 often holds 2 tech names in bull regimes.

allocations.strategy_type: Unified cross-sectional momentum — 20-instrument universe, top-3, 33% cap per name

positions_v11.description: Every 5 trading days, rank the 20-instrument universe by 120-day return and hold the top-3 with positive momentum, equal-weight, capped at 33% per name. The 18 leveraged equity ETFs (TQQQ/UPRO/QLD/SSO/SOXL/TECL/FAS/LABU/ERX/NUGT/DRN/EDC/YINN/UGL/UCO/TMF/TYD/UBT) are gated off to cash when SPY<200dma OR VIX>30. Crypto names (BTC/ETH) are gated off when BTC<200dma. Signal is lagged 1 bar: the momentum ranking uses closes through t-1 and is traded starting at bar t.

momo.name: Weekly Momentum Top-3
momo.desc: Top-3 of 20 (18 leveraged ETFs + BTC/ETH), weekly rebal, 33% cap

etfs.name: Direxion Daily MSCI Emerging Mkts Bull 3X

scaling_note: NOVA uses no portfolio-level volatility scaling. The single sleeve rotates its 3 holdings every 5 trading days based on 120-day return (signal lagged 1 bar to avoid look-ahead). Each name is capped at 33% so crypto cannot dominate the book. Equity names gate off to BIL when SPY<200dma or VIX>30; crypto names gate off when BTC<200dma.
